title: JSA snaps up three CMS INDUSLAW Corporate Partners and a team of 19 lawyers
description: CMS INDUSLAW Corporate Partners Siddharth Manchanda, Minhaz Lokhandwala and Rashi Saraf are moving to JSA Advocates & Solicitors, with their team of 18 associates and 1 retained partner, Vinit Patwari.Manchanda has been associated with CMS INDUSLAW, Mumbai for over 3 years across two separate stints. He has over 17 years of experience in venture capital and private equity investments, corporate M&A, corporate debt financing and general corporate advisory. For more than a decade, he has w
